> Canonical Maple marketing and product documentation now lives at https://www.trymaple.ai/llms.txt.

# Maple App Host

`https://trymaple.ai` is currently the Maple Research app and authentication entry point.

- App entry: https://trymaple.ai/
- Sign up: https://trymaple.ai/signup
- Log in: https://trymaple.ai/login
- Marketing home: https://www.trymaple.ai/
- Full marketing documentation: https://www.trymaple.ai/llms-full.txt

This short app-host file exists for compatibility while Maple is splitting marketing and app
surfaces across domains.
